alt: Nexus Orchestrator marketing landing page on desktop: hero headline "Architecting the Future of Nexus Orchestrator", trust-logo strip, three feature cards (Multi-Tenant Isolation, Visual Workflow Builder, Enterprise-Grade Security), stats section, testimonial quote, and closing CTA
Same Nexus Orchestrator landing page reflowed to a 390px-wide mobile viewport, single-column stacked layout

Live register page (/register), "Workspace setup" step: an "Organization Name" text field with placeholder "Acme Corp" and helper text "This becomes your team workspace and the home for your first workflows, runs, and audit history" — the public UI that ultimately calls createOrganizationForUser
Code excerpt from lib/observability/redaction.ts showing the redactSentryEventLike function that strips request/extra/contexts/breadcrumbs/user fields before a Sentry event is sent
Code excerpt from next.config.ts showing the withSentryConfig call and its tunnelRoute: "/monitoring" option with the accompanying cost-tradeoff comment
Code excerpt from app/hooks/[...path]/route.ts showing the two sequential webhook payload-size checks (declared Content-Length, then actual byte length)
Code excerpt from app/api/me/account/route.ts showing the per-organization admin-count loop that returns a 409 when the requesting user is the sole active admin
